message: Multiple canonical concepts match this query. Choose one to continue.

candidates.title: Control
candidates.shortDefinition: Control is the exercised ability to direct conditions, actions, or outcomes toward a chosen end.

candidates.title: Power
candidates.shortDefinition: Power is the capacity to shape outcomes, behavior, or conditions within a relationship or system.

candidates.title: Authority
candidates.shortDefinition: Authority is recognized power to direct, decide, or govern within a defined structure.

interpretation.message: This query matches multiple authored concepts and requires an explicit choice.
